summary: Decision layer for the idea portfolio: Thompson-sampling investment allocation from node posteriors (with a cold-start reconnaissance branch for nodes that have no posterior yet) plus activation-condition monitoring for waiting-activation ideas. Utility and cost stay out of the belief graph; allocation reads the posterior, it does not set it.

install.claude_code: Link into ~/.claude/skills or install via marketplace when available.
install.codex: Link into ~/.codex/skills for Codex native discovery.
